claims from beauty beauty red which virtue gave golden age gild their silver cheeks called then their shield teaching them thus use fight when shame assailed red should fence white heraldry lucrece face was seen argued beauty red virtue white either colour was other queen proving from world minority their right yet their ambition makes them still fight sovereignty either being great oft they interchange each other seat their silent war lilies roses which tarquin viewed fair face field their pure ranks traitor eye encloses where lest between them both should killed coward captive vanquished doth yield those two armies would let go rather than triumph false foe thinks husband shallow tongue niggard prodigal praised high task hath done beauty wrong which far exceeds barren skill
